headline: Is Franklin Resources (BEN) Still Attractive After A 50% One Year Share Price Jump
summary: If you are wondering whether Franklin Resources at around US$31.83 still offers value, the starting point is understanding what the recent share price is actually pricing in. The stock has delivered returns of 2.5% over the past 7 days, 16.7% over the past 30 days, 33.7% year to date and 50.4% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how much upside or downside is now reflected in the price. Recent coverage has focused on Franklin Resources as an established asset manager...
